overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Marvel's Spider-Man: Miles Morales showing the character web-swinging and wall-crawling through a snow-covered Manhattan during golden hour. The player traverses between skyscrapers with the Empire State Building visible in the distance, eventually climbing a glass tower near the waterfront.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered theater district with holiday decorations

events.description: transitions from rooftop jumping to wall-running down building facade
descends from aerial rooftop level to street level passing holiday decorations

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man leaps between snow-covered rooftops, wall-runs down a building face, and swings low over a street decorated with Christmas ornaments

entered.detail: tall building with decorative geometric patterns and snow on ledges
large illuminated digital screen displaying cyan-colored advertisement
theater entrance adorned with garlands, wreaths, and holiday signage
building roof with thick layer of snow covering the surface

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Spider-Man leaping between snow-covered rooftops in a wintery Manhattan. He wall-runs down an art deco building past digital billboards, then swings low over a street adorned with Christmas decorations where pedestrians are visible below.

scene_state.functional_zone: midtown skyscraper canyon with iconic landmark view

events.description: Empire State Building comes into view as altitude increases above street level
transitions from low swing to high-speed aerial traversal between towers

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man web-swings at high altitude between skyscrapers with the Empire State Building prominent in the background, performing fluid aerial maneuvers

entered.detail: iconic art deco skyscraper with illuminated top visible in the distance
traditional red brick apartment building with fire escapes
light-colored stone building with classical architectural details

segments.scene_description: Ascending above the street level, the scene opens up to reveal the Empire State Building in the distance. Spider-Man swings between midtown skyscrapers including a red brick building and beige classic stone structures, gaining altitude and speed as he traverses the urban canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense financial district with view toward waterfront

events.description: executes diving maneuver between buildings followed by rapid ascent
waterfront and harbor become visible in the distance between buildings

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man performs acrobatic aerial maneuvers including dives, loops, and rapid direction changes while swinging toward the waterfront at high velocity

entered.detail: modern building with dark reflective glass windows
body of water visible between buildings with distant shoreline

segments.scene_description: Moving through the financial district, Spider-Man executes high-speed aerial acrobatics including dramatic dives between dark glass skyscrapers. The Empire State Building remains visible but more distant as the camera approaches the waterfront, where the harbor becomes visible on the right side of the frame.

events.description: transitions from web-swinging to wall-crawling up glass building face
sun reflects off glass facade creating bright golden glare

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man transitions from swinging to rapidly climbing the glass curtain wall of a skyscraper near the water, moving upward with sticky hands and feet

entered.detail: tall modern skyscraper with reflective glass windows and metal framework
classic wooden water tank on rooftop against the skyline

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows Spider-Man transitioning from aerial swinging to wall-crawling up a modern glass skyscraper near the waterfront. The camera follows closely as he ascends the reflective glass facade, with the sun creating a golden glare on the windows and the water visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a snow-covered Manhattan that transitions from the festive streets of midtown to the reflective glass towers of the waterfront. It begins with Spider-Man leaping between wintery rooftops and wall-running down an art deco building, swinging low over Christmas decorations and pedestrians. As he ascends above the street level, the urban canyon opens up to reveal the Empire State Building in the distance while he gains speed between red brick and beige stone skyscrapers. The scene then shifts toward the financial district, where high-speed aerial dives between dark glass towers lead the camera toward the harbor appearing on the right. Finally, the movement transitions from swinging to a close-up ascent as Spider-Man crawls up a modern glass skyscraper, with the sun creating a golden glare across the reflective facade against the backdrop of the water.
